title: P1017
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated using mirVana RNA Isolation Kit (ThermoFisher). RNA concentration was measured using Qubit RNA BR assay kit (ThermoFisher). RNA integrity was checked using RNA 6000 Nano chip read by Aligent 2100 bioanalyzer. All samples had a RIN above 7.0.,RNAseq libraries were prepared using the TruSeq Stranded Total RNA Sample preparation kit with Ribo-Zero Gold (Illumina).
data_processing: Quality control was performed using FastQC (v. 0.11.3). Reads were mapped to GRCh38.89 (Ensembl) using STAR (v. 2.5.3a) (Dobin et al., 2013). The STAR parameters used were: --runThreadN 24 --sjdbOverhang 99 --genomeDir ref_ensembl_GRCh38_89/star_index --sjdbGTFtagExonParentGene gene_id --sjdbGTFfile ref_ensembl_GRCh38_89/Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.89.gtf --outSAMtype BAM Unsorted SortedByCoordinate --outReadsUnmapped Fastx --quantMode GeneCounts. Ensembl genes with at least 10 counts in 25% of samples were filtered for the analysis. Normalization and differential expression analysis were performed using R (v. 4.0.3) package DESeq2 (v. 1.30.1) (Love 2014). BiomaRt (v. 2.42.1) was used to convert Ensembl gene ID to HUGO gene names (Durinck 2009), and gene set enrichment analysis was done using R (v. 4.0.3) package FGSEA (v. 1.16.0).,Genome_build: GRCh38.89(Ensembl),Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Matrix table with normalized gene counts for every gene and every sample post filtering
